name: Substance Abuse & De-addiction Work
student_summary: Help people out of addiction — counselling and programme work.
overview: Help people out of addiction — counselling and programme work. Substance Abuse & De-addiction Work sits in the Psychology family of Social Impact, Psychology & Community Services. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You feel fulfilled when your work directly helps someone
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply addiction counselling to real problems
Collaborate with your team using relapse prevention
Keep improving at family therapy — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Hospitals, clinics and care settings — human contact all day
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: A broad Psychology foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Substance Abuse & De-addiction Work is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of relapse prevention
projects: Beginner: explore addiction counselling with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Screening tools
smaller_city_scope: Viable in smaller cities — demand exists well beyond the metros.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Counselling Psychology: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Clinical Psychology: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Community Health Work: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Substance Abuse & De-addiction Work pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹10 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Psychology, Biology. Typical degrees: M.A. Psychology/MSW + de-addiction specialization. Alternatives exist: any degree + msw.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Substance Abuse & De-addiction Work evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Substance Abuse & De-addiction Work is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
